page_content:
Prerequisite: HESP700 and HESP732.

Corequisite: HESP701.

HESP734 Basic Hearing Measurement Laboratory (1 Credit) Supplemental lab experience that coincides with HESP606: Basic Hearing Measurement. Students will complete hands-on learning activities to reinforce theoretical concepts from the didactic learning in HESP606. The goal of this lab is to facilitate the transfer of learning from the classroom to clinical practicum.
